mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT rownum rnum, data.* FROM ( SELECT id, like_code, like_tag FROM "LIKE" WHERE ${searchKey} LIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' ORDER BY id DESC ) data )
WHERE rnum >= #{start} AND rnum <= #{end}

SELECT f.f_code, f.c_id, f.c_kind, f.c_name, f.f_name, f.f_price, f.f_dprice, f.f_createddate, f.f_catagory1, f.f_catagory2, f.f_catagory3, f.f_catagory4, f.f_catagory5, f.f_discount, f.f_point, f.f_count, f.f_viewcount FROM "LIKE" l JOIN furniture f ON l.like_code = f.f_code WHERE l.id = #{id} AND l.like_tag = 'furniture' ORDER BY f.f_createddate DESC

SELECT c.c_id, c.c_kind, c.c_name, c.c_addr, c.c_tel, c.c_info, c.c_boss FROM "LIKE" l JOIN company c ON l.like_code = c.c_id || '_' || c.c_name || '_' || c.c_kind WHERE l.id = #{id} AND l.like_tag = 'interior' ORDER BY c.c_name
